options.a: Spherical particles of water that are liquid at temperatures below 0°C, and it can form hoar frost on airframes.
options.b: Spherical particles of water that are liquid at temperatures below 0°C, and it can form clear ice on airframes.
options.c: Frozen spherical particles of water, and it can be encountered as hail during flight.
options.d: Frozen spherical particles of water, and it can form hoar frost on airframes.
